summary: Phase 4 (BES Consultancy rebrand + Placement Gallery + Website Enquiries). Backend regression 73/73 PASS. New Phase 4 backend suite 18/18 PASS (public placements listing, admin CRUD w/ file uploads, publish/hide toggles, RBAC employee-blocked, public enquiry submit no-auth, list/unread-count/search/status-filter/mark-read/mark-replied/delete, xlsx export, admin notifications fired). Frontend: public landing fully rebranded — brand 'BES Consultancy · Placements Since 2010' (nav+footer), hero badge 'Placement Consultancy · Trusted since 2010', headline 'Welcome to BES Consultancy / Your Career Starts Here.' with gradient on 'Career Starts Here', subtitle mentions '15 years' + 'India's leading companies', CTAs 'Register Now' + 'Explore Opportunities' work, trust indicators (15+ Years of Excellence / Trusted Placement Consultancy / 1000+ Successful Placements) present. RecruitmentJourney shows all 6 stages (Student Profile→Profile Verified→Interview→Selected→Offer Letter→Placed). NEW Success Stories section renders '🎉 Recent Success Stories' heading + subtitle + horizontal marquee (.animate-marquee) with 8 seeded placement cards duplicated 4× for infinite loop; each card has avatar/name/role, company, ₹package, Nov 2025 date, green 'Placed' badge. Marquee animation confirmed running (animationPlayState=running). Stats bar (15+/25,000+/1,500+/300+/100%), Workflow, Features, Product Showcase, Why-Us, Testimonials, FAQ, CTA all still present and ordered correctly after Success Stories section. Contact form → toast 'Message received. We'll be in touch shortly.' + persists to DB (verified: entry shows in admin /app/enquiries as 'Unread'). Admin login → sidebar shows 'Placement Gallery' + 'Website Enquiries' (with red '2' unread badge). /app/placements shows all 8 seeded cards with edit/hide/delete controls + Add Placement button + edit-placement-{id} testids per card. /app/enquiries shows enquiries list with '2 unread' pill, enq-search, enq-status-filter, export-enq-btn all present, submitted enquiries visible. Employee (priya@ugs.com) does NOT see the two new sidebar items (RBAC verified in UI).

issues: Copy 'Ready to shut down Excel for good?' still references legacy UGS HireFlow value-prop; not a defect since PRD says 'everything else on landing untouched', but worth reviewing whether it aligns with BES Consultancy public brand

Login screen still shows 'UGS HireFlow · Recruitment, operationalised.' branding — acceptable per PRD (internal), but ensure candidates registering via public site aren't confused when redirected here

critical_code_review_comments: routes_v3.py: create_placement/update_placement uploaded FileRef records saved but public/admin endpoints return only file_id — frontend may need a resolver endpoint (e.g. /api/files/{id}) to actually display uploaded photos/logos. Seeded placements have no file_id (avatars are letter tiles) so this only matters when admins upload custom images.
routes_v3.py get_current_user vs require_roles('admin') on /enquiries/unread-count returns {unread:0} for non-admins instead of 403 — intentional (called by sidebar for all roles), acceptable.
Admin notifications: create_notification is called per-admin-user in a loop; fine at small scale but could be batch-inserted for larger admin fleets.
SuccessStoriesSection marquee duplicates card list 4× in DOM — memory-cheap but consider CSS-only infinite scroll clone (2× copies) if placement count grows > 50.
seed_data_creation: Phase 4 auto-seeds 8 published placements on first startup (idempotent). Contact form submissions from E2E tests were created and left in DB (2 unread visible in admin).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 is complete and green. New testids: brand-logo, hero-register-btn, hero-explore-btn, contact-{name,email,phone,subject,message,submit}, sidebar-placement-gallery, sidebar-website-enquiries, add-placement-btn, pl-{name,company,role,photo,logo,submit}, edit-placement-{id}, enq-search, enq-status-filter, export-enq-btn, mark-replied-btn. Marquee container class '.animate-marquee' (or '.marquee-track') — hover-pause via CSS :hover on wrapper (Playwright hover assertion is unreliable because tracked element is perpetually translating; verify via animationPlayState computed style on wrapper's :hover state via JS eval instead of Playwright hover). Two enquiries left in DB from E2E runs; delete via admin UI or /api/enquiries/{id} DELETE if cleanup needed.
